title: Villager BOSS MOD
body:
Defeat the Crazy Villager BOSS!

**Need Geckolib Mod**

-- Hard difficulty!
-- Can be summoned in Survival!
-- Supports NeoForge 1.21.1!

![boss](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f715fdd8baf07050ca62a89405aae5f16d1aa243.png)
A new Resident Boss will be added that looks like this!

![recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ad61aa8812ed4fdcf4b8f9658fa03ab37c1980e9.png)
You can get spawn eggs with this recipe!

Install the mod now!
